untranslatable_reason: Measured Move Down requires multi-leg pattern recognition (first leg, retracement phase, second leg) and specific retracement level analysis (16%, 20%, 35%, 52%) which cannot be expressed with single-bar indicators. The pattern also requires volume dome shape confirmation during the corrective phase, which requires multi-bar volume pattern analysis not available in the indicator set. Exit conditions depend on precise retracement zone identification relative to the corrective phase, requiring pattern memory/state tracking beyond available indicators.
